payload.subject: Self-readiness audit T3 — consensus result: READY-WITH-CAVEATS (all 3 agents)

votes.primary_caveat: state.db processed flag staleness (F2 issue — tracking gap, no operational impact). Stale .bak files in scripts/. Both informational.
git remotes for unratified and observatory not configured — cross-repo-fetch for those agents broken. HIGH severity but non-blocking for primary operations.
MANIFEST.json session status fields show all sessions as 'open' including completed ones. Informational tracking gap. Also: .agent-identity.json capabilities understated (remediated this sync).
